headline: 7 reasons why the Hormuz shock hasn’t tipped the world into recession: BCA
summary: Investing.com -- The global economy has proven more resilient than many feared in the wake of the Strait of Hormuz closure, but BCA Research is warning that the window for avoiding a recession is narrowing fast.

headline: Barclays’ Cau warns upside in stocks is limited unless energy risks fade
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays strategist Emmanuel Cau was cautious on equities in a note Wednesday, despite markets hitting fresh highs, warning that a further rally is difficult to justify while energy risks remain elevated and the global economy approaches what he describes as a critical inflection point.

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on Colgate-Palmolive Stock?
summary: While Colgate-Palmolive has considerably trailed the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
